title: The Return of the Songbirds
content: We've noticed an increase in bird activity near the central pond. Keep your binoculars ready, as many of our favorite migratory species have begun to arrive for the season.  Happy bird watching!

title: Spring Blossoms in the Park
content: ### What to Look For: * **Trillium**: These delicate white flowers are appearing in the shaded areas. * **Wild Violets**: Look closely near the base of the older oaks. * **Dandelions**: Bright yellow
